name: Rolls-Royce Wings4Her Kind Circle Scholarship 2025–26
eligibility: Female students pursuing higher education in engineering or technology fields

name: vivo KanyaGyaan Scholarship Program 2025-26
eligibility: Girl students who have passed Class 12 and are pursuing higher education

name: Buddy4Study Scholarship Support Programme 2026-27
eligibility: Students from economically weaker sections pursuing undergraduate or postgraduate courses

name: College Board 90% Fee Waiver Program
eligibility: Class 11 and 12 students

name: Masters' Union: Scholarship-cum-Admission Seats (SAS) Program 2025 (UG in Data Science & AI)
eligibility: For Undergraduate students pursuing Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
amount: Tuition fee waiver of up to 80%

name: NURTR Nurturing Minds with Chess Program (90% Fee Waiver) 2025-26
eligibility: School or college students under the age range of 5 to 25 years

name: STEM Scholarship Interest Form 2026-27
eligibility: Students passionate about STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics)
amount: Priority consideration for various upcoming STEM scholarships

name: Nirman Shramik Kalyan Yojana Scholarship, Odisha 2026-27
eligibility: Children of construction workers, studying in Class 6 and above

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students, Delhi 2025-26
eligibility: OBC students pursuing Class 11 and above in Delhi
amount: Up to ₹750 per month with other benefits

name: Vigyan Jyoti Scheme
provider: Department of Science & Technology, Government of India
eligibility: Female students in Class 9 and above pursuing science education

name: LPUNEST Study Grant 2026-27
eligibility: Top LPUNEST qualifiers admitted to IITs, NITs, AIIMS, IIMs, NLUs, NIRF-ranked institutions

name: INMAS DRDO Internship 2026
eligibility: UG/PG students from Engineering or Science disciplines

name: Catalyst Scholarship Programme 2026
eligibility: Engineering students from economically weaker sections

name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships for College and University Students
provider: Ministry of Education, Government of India
eligibility: Class 12 passed students above 80th percentile, family income below ₹8 lakh per annum

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
provider: Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India
eligibility: SC students, family income below ₹2.5 lakh per annum, pursuing post-matric education
amount: Full tuition fee + maintenance allowance up to ₹1,200/month

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for ST Students
provider: Ministry of Tribal Affairs, Government of India
eligibility: ST students, family income below ₹2.5 lakh per annum, pursuing post-matric education
amount: Full tuition fee + maintenance allowance up to ₹1,200/month

name: Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme for Minorities
provider: Ministry of Minority Affairs, Government of India
eligibility: Minority community students (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Parsi), income below ₹2 lakh
amount: Up to ₹10,000 per annum + maintenance allowance

name: PM's Scholarship Scheme for Wards of Ex-Servicemen / Ex-Coast Guard
provider: Ministry of Defence, Government of India
eligibility: Wards and widows of Ex-Servicemen / Ex-Coast Guard personnel pursuing professional courses

name: Pragati Scholarship for Girl Students (AICTE)
eligibility: Girl students admitted to AICTE-approved institutions for technical education, family income below ₹8 lakh

name: Saksham Scholarship for Differently Abled Students (AICTE)
eligibility: Differently abled students with at least 40% disability, admitted to AICTE-approved institutions, family income below ₹8 lakh

name: KVPY (Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana) Fellowship
provider: Department of Science & Technology, Government of India
eligibility: Students from Class 11 to first year of any undergraduate program in basic sciences

name: INSPIRE Scholarship (SHE) for Higher Education
provider: Department of Science & Technology, Government of India
eligibility: Top 1% students in Class 12 board exams pursuing natural and basic science courses at B.Sc./B.S./Int. M.Sc. level

name: AICTE Swanath Scholarship Scheme
eligibility: Orphans, wards of Armed Forces/Central Paramilitary Forces martyred in action, wards of parents died due to COVID-19

name: Ishan Uday Special Scholarship for North Eastern Region
eligibility: Students from NE states with family income below ₹4.5 lakh, pursuing UG courses

name: Kind Circle Scholarship for Meritorious Students
eligibility: Meritorious students from underprivileged backgrounds pursuing higher education
